News

Hello, Laurel

First post! A quick tour of what's working and what's coming next.

Casper
19 May 2026 • 1 min read
Share

Welcome to Laurel — a static site generator built around Ghost themes and Markdown content.

What works today

  • The official Ghost Casper theme renders end-to-end against this content.
  • Posts, pages, tags, authors, pagination, RSS, sitemap — all generated.
  • Theme custom settings (@custom.*) come from laurel.toml.

What we're working on next

  • Smarter {{img_url}} with build-time resizing.
  • A laurel dev server that watches content and theme files.
  • A pluggable component registry for search, comments, and OG image generation.

Laurel is the substance bees turn into honey. We thought it was a fitting name for the substrate a Ghost theme turns into a blog.
